_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn about the things and actions in our everyday routines.

_source.w: We learn about the things and actions in our everyday routines.
y: Knowing our routines helps us feel safe and in control.
Routines give us a sense of what is happening next.
Being aware of routines helps us participate more actively.
eg: We recognise that getting our bag means it is home time.
We anticipate what comes next in our daily schedule.
We notice the objects used in familiar routines — cup, spoon, towel.
We show we understand a routine by doing the next step.
We respond to a visual schedule showing our daily activities.
We look for familiar items that signal a favourite activity is coming.
